headline: How The Nordson (NDSN) Investment Story Is Evolving With New Targets And Segment Trends
summary: Nordson’s fair value estimate has shifted from US$295.40 to US$313.40, reflecting a refreshed view of what some analysts think the shares may be worth. Recent research links higher price targets in the US$325 to US$335 range to confidence in Q1 execution and the potential for more even growth across all three segments. As you read on, you will see how this updated narrative is taking shape and what you can watch to track its evolution. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Nordson shifts by...
